title: tengine.session.frame v1
description: Per-step heartbeat from silo_tester: emitted after each step command completes. Carries current frame number, FPS aggregates, average frame time, and cumulative anomaly count since session start.

frame.description: current GPU frame index after the step completes

stepped.description: number of frames advanced in this step command

fps_avg.description: rolling average FPS over recent frames

fps_min.description: minimum FPS observed in the tracking window

fps_max.description: maximum FPS observed in the tracking window

frame_time_ms.description: average frame time in milliseconds (1000/fps_avg); 0 when fps_avg is 0

anomaly_count.description: cumulative visual anomaly count from the GPU anomaly ring buffer since session start; consumers can compute per-step delta by diffing successive values
